question: Which of the following describes the theme of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A group of people watching a movie outdoors. (B) A large open space where people are enjoying themselves. (C) A carnival with colorful lights and games. (D) A concert with crowds dancing to live music.
gold_answer: A large open space where people are enjoying themselves
answer_choices: A group of people watching a movie outdoors
A large open space where people are enjoying themselves
A carnival with colorful lights and games
A concert with crowds dancing to live music

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A quiet park area with benches, trees, and soft ambient lighting
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Colorful carnival lights, games, rides, or festive decorations
